$comment: SOURCE OF TRUTH for the Frontend contract container. Jon ratified the apps/web component foundation rule on 2026-06-05.
title: Frontend
summary: Frontend contract container for UI, routing, layout, components, accessibility, and design system rules.

rules.text: apps/web must use real shadcn/ui source components for UI primitives and real Vercel AI Elements / AI SDK React source components for AI, chat, prompt, terminal, file-tree, code, model, and workbench surfaces. Local components may compose those approved source components, but must not replace them with bespoke approximations, placeholder primitives, or handrolled components named as if they were shadcn or Vercel AI Elements. Legacy E:/chattr/static is behavior reference only, not the visual/component/design target.

enforcedBy: AGENTS.md, apps/web/AGENTS.md, dependency allowlist checks, and human/code review until component-origin checks are automated.
enforcement: Review apps/web component imports: UI primitives must originate from shadcn/ui source components; AI/workbench surfaces must originate from Vercel AI Elements / AI SDK React source components.
openItems: Automate component-origin checks for apps/web once the first approved source-component inventory lands.
